reviews.review_description: This is one of the best apps I have downloaded. Loads of entertainment for hours. Hope to see more soon. The ride is never long enough.
Way cool fun experience

UPDATE 12/30/16: 
No more screen freezing has been experienced after several more runs, so I have changed rating from 4 to 5 stars. There is still room for improvement, however, such as with my suggestions below. I also have one more minor suggestion: I noticed on the sides of the coaster it says "Let your arms inside", I think what you guys meant was "Keep your arms inside", for better English. 

Still overall, definitely worth the purchase.



----- Original review: 12/28/16 -----

It was pretty good, but now the latest update causes the screen to occasionally freeze, at least on the s6 edge. Please fix or revert back to previous version.

I really like this app and I want it to succeed, so here's a few things I noticed that can be improved: 

- Sometimes it is very difficult to choose a different path, usually after the first or second ride. I look at the sign but nothing will happen. 

- When you repeat the same path, some of the animations are missing the second time for both paths. For example, the small boulder in the beginning and the large boulder towards the end of the adventure path disappear if you take that path a second time. The red bat creatures and the ghost near the end of the fantasy path disappear if you take it a second time. 

- I don't remember which, but one of the filters made the entire screen turn white.

- Like lots of other here have said, the screen sometimes gets very jittery when looking around during a part with a lot of animation, it would be great if you found a fix for this. 

Everything else is great; address the issues above, as well as the freezing problem that I noticed after updating earlier today, and this would definitely be a 5 star app, especially for the current price.
Good game for that price

This has a great concept but it is so jittery everytime you move your head or an action happens. The graphics are a bit cheesy and some of the characters don't move as they are supposed too (like the spiders float sometimes instead of their legs moving). Overall it's a cool experience but needs a lot of work. I gave it 3 stars because I love roller coasters and I could see this being awesome once the developers improve and fix it. Hopefully they will. If they do I will revise my review to be higher. If they don't then this should really be a 2 star app. 

Note to developer: What would really be cool would be if you could shoot targets while riding (like on Buzz Lightyear at Disneyland). That would give some replay value. Also if you guys could create a really fun and graphic app where users could create the roller coasters then ride them, you would be heroes. You could make it 40gb's and $20 and I would still buy it (as long,assuming playability is worth it). Just a thought. I know VR is new but that would bring on a new era of VR. Think how successful Roller Coaster Tycoon 3 was.

developer_response.body: Hi KingJazzblue, We have many idea for for follow to improve Darkness but we are on Gear VR and not Occulus rift ! So we can't put all features you want without lose FPS. Also your idea to create your own ride sounds good but when the ride is done, you create monsters ? you add sound effect ? musics ? animation... ? even Real Tycoon don't do all this ! for this you need a game engine like Unity ;)

reviews.review_description: F**kin luv it !!
It reminds me of a carnival or beach boardwalk haunted house coaster. It would be perfect to scare kids, but a little too tame to be any more than silly for adults. Well put together, though!

reviews.review_description: This is a really solid VR coaster, the graphics are really enjoyable and the atmosphere is like a haunted ride at disney world, more fun and not "horror". There is also a "filter" mode which adds a while new vibe to both rides on the app. The only better coaster app is the Rilix ride, but honestly this has a lot more "ride time" than that so its a close second

This is definitely the best roller coaster game for the Gear VR. The graphics are beautiful and interesting. The only problem I had was that there were a few times that after I turned a filter on, it wouldn't let me turn it back off, but it only did that for the horror filter. Other than that the ride was fantastic! I played it while in my swivel chair to add to the effect and it was a blast! The filters are a really interesting touch. You can also find hidden graphics (I played until I found them all myself) which gives it a nice touch because then you can run through the same tracks a few times and still find something new each time. Definitely worth the money. I can't wait for more tracks! #peace and love

developer_response.body:
Many Thanks Mega_Megan ! it's for comment like this that we love devellop VR apps.
Congratulation you win our new VR app, we expect to launch it in couple of weeks !

reviews.review_description: Jonathanledbetter@rocketmail.com

reviews.review_description: Wow what a brilliant Rollercoaster ride, please keep up the brilliant work and keep producing more of these thrilling rides.
Wow! Great ride and graphics-thanks to the awesome developers!! A code sent to drtonedog@gmail.com would be greatly appreciated-thanks!!’

reviews.review_title: You’re only getting one of two rides
reviews.review_description: As we approach 4-5 years into mainstream home-use VR, we are starting to see more and more apps abandoned with no updates, rendering many of them broken and unplayable. Such a shame. Darkness Rollercoaster is such a title, it seems, but luckily it still has a shred of dignity left. When I paid a couple of dollars for it back in February, I more or less liked it. I didn’t review it then because I was up to my eyeballs in coaster apps. I liked how over the top it was; it felt like one of those Tim Burton movie introductions with the Danny Elfman score. The graphics were pretty good, and I liked the imagination that went into it. This was (and still is) something that the more adventurous kids out there could totally get into. At the time, there were two tracks, one with a horror/adventure theme and the other with a fantasy theme. I really liked the latter, because it was unique and had memorable imagery. Which brings me to the main disappointment surrounding this experience: the fantasy ride is broken. You go to select it on the right side of the track and as you progress that way, you fall off the track into a pit and the screen goes eternally black. Ooooh-kay. If you finish the horror ride on the left first, it asks you at the end if you want to go again and would you like to ride the other track. You select it, and at the last second, the track flips back to the left, sending you on the horror ride again. Highly amusing. I guess I should still be grateful the one ride works at all. It’s not bad; just know you won’t be getting the fantasy ride as well, which is also what you’re paying for. As exciting of a time as it is for VR, this is the ugly truth to many good experiences out there.
Nicely done graphics are sweet like the surprises. Love it make more.
anyone know why can't I download midnight coaster
